user.title: Home Security Assistant
user.description: Configure the NetFlow listener, internal networks, active scanner, and optional threat intel enrichment.

data.enable_scanner: Enable active network scanner (ping + port scan)
data.scan_ports: Ports to scan (comma-separated ports or ranges, e.g. 22,80,443,8000-9000)
data.enrichment_ttl_minutes: Enrichment cache TTL (minutes, re-query providers after this)
data.nvd_api_key: NVD API key (optional, increases rate limit to 50 req/30 s)
data.nvd_ttl_hours: NVD cache TTL (hours, re-fetch CVEs after this)
data.nvd_min_year: NVD minimum CVE year (0 = all years, no filtering)
data.stats_top_n: Statistics: top N entries to show (3–25)
data.shodan_enrich_mode: Shodan enrichment scope (all = every public IP, threat = suspicious/malicious only, none = disabled)

init.title: Home Security Assistant — Options
init.description: Update listener, detection thresholds, active scanner, and enrichment settings.

data.scan_ports: Ports to scan (comma-separated ports or ranges, e.g. 22,80,443,8000-9000)
data.enrichment_ttl_minutes: Enrichment cache TTL (minutes, re-query providers after this)
data.nvd_api_key: NVD API key (optional, increases rate limit to 50 req/30 s)
data.nvd_ttl_hours: NVD cache TTL (hours, re-fetch CVEs after this)
data.nvd_min_year: NVD minimum CVE year (0 = all years, no filtering)
data.stats_top_n: Statistics: top N entries to show (3–25)
data.shodan_enrich_mode: Shodan enrichment scope (all = every public IP, threat = suspicious/malicious only, none = disabled)

trigger_scan.name: Trigger active host scan
trigger_scan.description: Immediately run a full active network scan (ping + port scan) for all known and observed IPs, without waiting for the next scheduled interval.

nvd_refresh.name: Refresh NVD vulnerability database
nvd_refresh.description: Flush the local NVD CVE cache and re-fetch fresh vulnerability data from the National Vulnerability Database.
